_comment: pecli rfd3na submit-time sampler config for the binder block. These are the diffusion knobs, NOT the design layout (that lives in the rfd3na_specs/*.json). Values match the paper (Sehgal et al. 2026, Fig. S4f) and pecli rfd3na defaults. Field names follow the pecli rfd3na tool interface; see pecli/tools/guides/rfd3na.md.

_smoke_test._comment: SMOKE TEST scale first (user decision): ~10 designs total to validate the spec end-to-end before committing GPU budget. total designs = diffusion_batch_size * n_batches.
_smoke_test._gpu_note: L40S 48GB: protein+dsDNA is a multi-chain complex; start on large to avoid an A10G OOM on the smoke test, then right-size for the full run based on observed memory.

_full_run._comment: Paper scale for reference (NOT for the smoke test): ~1000 backbones per ori. Run only after the smoke test validates the spec. Swept once per ori spec in the manifest.
